rationale: Educ. Code §29.051 establishes state policy on bilingual education and English language programs. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: English is the basic language of this state. Public schools are responsible for providing a full opportunity for all students to become competent in speaking, reading, writing, and comprehending the English language.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no fiscal or operational linkage.
